zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Appleton於1490年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可厄爾 斯頓哈姆時，她的父親Thomas Appleton49歲，母親Margaret Crane11487歲。她於1505年與Edward Byrde在英國素福爾可厄爾 斯頓哈姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1550年在她的家鄉享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Appleton于1490年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可厄爾 斯頓哈姆时，她的父亲Thomas Appleton49岁，母亲Margaret Crane11487岁。她于1505年与Edward Byrde在英国素福爾可厄爾 斯頓哈姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1550年在她的家乡享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Appleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places in all parts of England named Appleton, from Old English æppeltūn ‘orchard’ (literally ‘apple enclosure’). Apples were particularly important in the Middle Ages as a food for survival through the winter.
History: This surname was brought to North America in 1635 by Samuel Appleton, who migrated from Ipswich, England, to Ipswich, MA.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Appleton was born in 1490, in Earl Stonham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Appleton, was 49 and her mother, Margaret Crane, was 11487. She married Edward Byrde in 1505, in Earl Stonham, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1550, in her hometown, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Appleton est née en 1490, à Earl Stonham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Appleton, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Margaret Crane, avait 11487 ans. Elle a épousé Edward Byrde en 1505, à Earl Stonham, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1550, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Appleton è nata il nel 1490 nel Earl Stonham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Appleton, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Margaret Crane, aveva 11487 anni. ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Appletonが1490年にイギリスイギリススフォルクエアルル ストンハムで生まれた時，父Thomas Appletonは49歳，母Margaret Craneは11487歳であった。1505年にイギリススフォルクエアルル ストンハムでEdward Byrdeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1550年に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Appleton(이)가 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 에를 스토함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Appleton(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Crane(은)는 11487세였다. 그녀는 1505년 영국 수폴크 에를 스토함에서 Edward Byrde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1550년 그녀의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Appleton родилась в 1490 г. в местности эарл стонам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Appleton было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Crane, 11487. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Byrde в 1505 г. в местности эарл стонам, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1550 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.
